I Can Only Imagine (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $83,482,352Details
International Box Office $2,301,215
Worldwide Box Office $85,783,567
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $18,977,458
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $10,019,289
Total $28,996,747
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The true story behind MercyMe’s beloved, multi-platinum song, which has brought hope to millions.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,108,914 (20.5% of total gross)
Legs:4.88 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:97.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$7,000,000 (worldwide box office is 12.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,627 opening theaters/2,894 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $109,599,227

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 16th, 2018 (Wide) by Roadside Attractions
International Releases: March 16th, 2018 (Wide) (New Zealand)
March 16th, 2018 (Wide) (Australia)
March 16th, 2018 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
May 24th, 2018 (Wide) (South Korea)
May 25th, 2018 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
Video Release: June 5th, 2018 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for thematic elements including some violence.
(Rating bulletin 2490 (Cert #51203), 8/23/2017)
Running Time: 110 minutes
Franchise: I Can Only Imagine
Cast, crew, or production detail: Same Role, Multiple Actors
Plot point: Child Abuse, Christians, Dysfunctional Family, Religious, Singers, Songwriter, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Faith-Based Drama
Target audience: Faith-Based Film
Source:Based on Song
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Erwin Brothers Entertainment, South West Film Group, Mission Pictures International, LD Entertainment, City on a Hill Studio
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
